project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with Fastify backends and Next.js frontends
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turbo for orchestration. Apps in apps/, shared code in packages/
test_framework: Vitest with globals: true, tests in backend/__tests__/*.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run from the app directory. 2. Run tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json from apps/quantdocs/
setup_instructions: pnpm install in workspace root, dependencies installed from pnpm-lock.yaml
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install packages from registries. Node >=22.0.0, pnpm@10.28.1, TypeScript ~5.5.0, Vitest ^2
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, services follow class-based pattern with constructor DI, routes use Fastify plugin pattern with zod validation, AI services use @quant/ai AIEngine.infer() method
key_patterns: Services: class with constructor(prisma/ai), methods that throw createAppError. Routes: Fastify plugin functions with zod schema validation. Tests: vi.fn() mocks for prisma/ai, describe/it blocks. Package naming: @quant/<appname>. App type: 'quantdocs' needs to be added to QuantApp type in packages/common/src/types.ts
directory_structure: apps/ contains app workspaces (quantmail, quantchat, etc), packages/ has shared libs (ai, auth, common, server-core, database, realtime, etc), services/ has infrastructure services
